By July 21, 2023, he had clinched victories in three Ryder Cups and earned numerous tour titles. His skill and determination led him to a runner-up finish in the prestigious PGA Championship.
activity_question: In which English town was Paul Casey born?
follow_up_question: What major golf tournament did Paul Casey finish as runner-up in?

title: A Sweet Start for a YouTube Baking Star
story: A future cake-making sensation entered the world on July 21, 1977. Yolanda Gampp, born in Toronto, Ontario, would grow up to become a famous Canadian baker. Her YouTube channel, How to Cake It, has made her a star in the world of baking videos, teaching people how to create amazing cakes.
activity_question: Where was Yolanda Gampp born?
follow_up_question: What kind of videos does Yolanda Gampp make on her YouTube channel?

title: Reggae Royalty: Damian Marley's Birth
story: A new reggae star was born on July 21, 1978, in Kingston, Jamaica. Damian Marley, son of legendary musician Bob Marley, entered the world ready to carry on his father's musical legacy. Growing up surrounded by rhythm and melody, Damian would later become a celebrated artist in his own right, blending reggae with modern sounds.

title: Splashing into Olympic History
story: A future swimming champion took her first breath in Numazu, Japan. Kyoko Iwasaki was born on July 21, 1978, destined for aquatic greatness. Her powerful strokes would one day propel her through the water and onto the Olympic podium. In 1992, Iwasaki made waves by winning gold in the 200-meter breaststroke, cementing her place in swimming history.
activity_question: What Olympic event did Kyoko Iwasaki win gold in?
follow_up_question: How old was Kyoko Iwasaki when she won her Olympic gold medal?

title: A Star is Born: Juno Temple
story: Lights, camera, action! On July 21, 1989, a future star entered the world. Juno Temple, the talented English actress, was born in London. Years later, she'd charm audiences with her role in the hit show Ted Lasso. Temple's journey from London baby to beloved TV character shows how following your dreams can lead to amazing places!

title: Explorer Finds Hidden Paradise in Polynesia
story: Álvaro de Mendaña's ship sailed into history in 1595. The Spanish explorer spotted a group of lush islands rising from the blue Pacific. He had just become the first European to find the Marquesas Islands in Eastern Polynesia. These remote, tropical gems had been home to Polynesian people for centuries before Mendaña's arrival on July 21.
activity_question: What did Álvaro de Mendaña discover?
follow_up_question: Why do you think islands like the Marquesas remained undiscovered by Europeans for so long?
